data.content: This is an **MSTest v3** project running on **Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP)** (indicated by `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true` in `Directory.Build.props`). I'll run only the Integration-category tests.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MTP filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with MTP filter

data.reasoningText:
This is an MSTest v3 project using Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP) — indicated by `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true` in Directory.Build.props and `MSTest` v3.8.0. With MTP, filtering uses `--filter` but the syntax differs from VSTest.

For MTP with MSTest, to filter by TestCategory "Integration", the filter syntax should be:
- `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"` 

Let me run the tests.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MTP filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-863786215ad74e759c3c5af20d4420ac && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with MTP filter", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with MTP filter
